CLINICAL_DOCUMENT_TEXT: 10-year-old female presenting with recurrent respiratory infections and failure to thrive. Possible CF — referral to pulmonology placed. Sweat chloride test ordered.
Confirmed diagnosis of cystic fibrosis following positive sweat test and CFTR genetic panel. Homozygous F508del. Initiating multidisciplinary management plan.
Routine CF clinic visit. Patient tolerating CFTR modulator well. Growth trajectory improved.
